title: Advances in Computer Games 16
text: Home * Conferences * Advances in Computer Games 16 < Prev Next > Advances in Computer Games 16 , from August 11 to 13, 2019 , Macau , China in conjunction with the WCCC 2019 , the WCSC 2019 , and the 22nd Computer Olympiad , all organized by the ICGA , alongside with the 28th IJCAI conference [1] .
